purpose: Identity verification and personal information documents for Ahmad Ali's integration course application.

validationCriteria.description: Full name must be consistent across all identity documents
All date fields must be valid and logically consistent
Afghan documents require certified German translations
validationCriteria.requirements: Translation must be by a sworn translator (beeidigter Übersetzer)

validationCriteria.description: Verify Afghan nationality and refugee status documentation

processingGuidelines: Verify Ahmad Ali's name consistency across all documents
Check birth date matches 15.05.1990 on all documents
Ensure Afghan documents have certified German translations
Verify residence permit is valid for integration course eligibility

commonMistakes.mistake: Missing certified translation for Afghan birth certificate
commonMistakes.resolution: Request certified German translation from sworn translator
Document variations, use residence permit spelling as primary
